items.title: LambdaLisp - A Lisp Interpreter That Runs on Lambda Calculus
items.summary: A Lisp interpreter written as an untyped lambda calculus term

items.title: Building a Neural Network in Pure Lisp Without Built-In Numbers Using Only Atoms and Lists
items.summary: A neural network written in pure Lisp without built-in numbers using only atoms and lists in SectorLISP, a 512-byte Lisp interpreter written by the authors of the SectorLISP project.

items.title: A Lisp Interpreter Implemented in Conway’s Game of Life
items.summary: Lisp in Life is a Lisp interpreter implemented in Conway's Game of Life.

items.title: Extending SectorLISP to Implement BASIC REPLs and Games
items.summary: Supporting interactive programs in SectorLISP, a 512-byte Lisp interpreter written by the authors of the SectorLISP project.
